title: Steel Dynamics: Competitive Energy Price Advantage For Foreseeable Future
text: While growing expectations of a severe global economic slowdown will probably weigh heavily on steelmakers in the short term, there are reasons to start looking at some U.S.-based companies. Steel Dynamics is a domestic U.S. company that produces steel, as well as processing recycled metals.  It has a healthy financial situation.

title: Here is Why Growth Investors Should Buy Steel Dynamics (STLD) Now
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) could produce exceptional returns because of its solid growth attributes.

title: Steel Dynamics Stock Jumps On Strong Profit Forecast
text: The company said profitability in the current quarter from the company's steel operations is expected to be historically strong.

title: Steel Dynamics stock bounces after providing upbeat profit outlook, a day after rival warned of a profit miss
text: Shares of Steel Dynamics Inc. STLD, -8.99% bounced 4.6% in premarket trading Thursday, after the steel producer and metals recycler provided a third-quarter profit outlook that was above expectations, citing "historically strong" steel operations. The upbeat outlook comes a day after the stock tumbled 9.0%, after fellow steel producer Nucor Corp. NUE, -11.31% issued a profit warning, as weakness in its steel mills business offset strength in steel products.
